CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER, customer_id INTEGER, order_date DATE, amount DECIMAL);
SELECT last(amount) FROM orders WHERE customer_id = 1 ORDER BY order_date DESC;
SELECT last(amount) FROM (SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY id DESC) AS subquery GROUP BY customer_id;
CREATE TABLE customers (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR);
SELECT c.name, last(o.amount) FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY c.name;
SELECT last(o.amount) FROM orders o WHERE o.order_date > '2023-09-01' ORDER BY order_date DESC;
SELECT last(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY order_date DESC) AS last_amount FROM orders;
CREATE TABLE products (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, price DECIMAL);
INSERT INTO products VALUES (1, 'Product A', 99.99), (2, 'Product B', 49.99);
SELECT p.name, last(o.amount) AS last_order_amount FROM products p LEFT JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY p.name;
SELECT last(o.amount) FROM (SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_date < '2023-09-06') subquery ORDER BY order_date DESC;
SELECT last(o.amount) FROM orders o WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers c WHERE c.id = o.customer_id AND c.name = 'Alice') ORDER BY o.order_date DESC;
